title: Big Crystals
description: big crystals makes dropped end crystals bigger so you can see them easier especially on smps where they are rare or valuable it only changes the dropped model so crystals stay normal in hand inventory and hotbar and it works with any other texture pack
body:
Big Crystals is a simple but super useful texture pack that makes dropped End Crystals larger, so they’re much easier to spot on the ground. This is especially helpful on SMP servers where End Crystals are rare, expensive, or very valuable — you won’t accidentally miss them anymore.

The pack only changes the model of dropped crystals, which means:

End Crystals keep their normal size in your hand
They look the same in your inventory and hotbar
No gameplay advantage, just better visibility

Because it only edits the model and not the actual item textures, Big Crystals is fully compatible with other texture packs. You can safely use it together with PvP packs, default edits, or any other resource packs without conflicts.

If you’ve ever lost or overlooked a dropped End Crystal, this pack is a small change that makes a big difference.
